Terms of Service

Last updated: 2026-07-08

1. Acceptance

By accessing https://playarcadex.com you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

2. The service

PlayArcadeX provides free access to browser games supplied by third-party developers and our distribution partner GameMonetize. Games are provided "as is" and may be added, changed or removed at any time without notice.

3. Acceptable use

You agree not to misuse the site — including attempting to disrupt the service, scrape content at abusive rates, rehost games without rights, or use the site for any unlawful purpose.

4. Intellectual property

All games, trademarks and related assets belong to their respective developers and publishers. The PlayArcadeX name, design and original site content belong to us. See our DMCA page for copyright matters.

5. Third-party content and ads

Embedded games may contain advertising served by third parties. We are not responsible for the content of third-party games, ads or external links.

6. Disclaimer and liability

The site is provided without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, PlayArcadeX shall not be liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of the site or embedded games.

7. Changes

We may update these terms; continued use of the site after changes means you accept the updated terms.

8. Contact
